field.name: HeaderFields
field.value: zero or more header field lines; each: field-name (token) ':' [SP] field-value (ASCII excluding CRLF) CRLF

field.name: HeaderFields
field.value: *( field-name ':' OWS field-value CRLF ) ; ASCII/obs-text, no CRLF within a field-value

field.name: Message-Body
field.value: OCTET* (present only if allowed and indicated by headers or connection close)

field.name: Reason-Phrase
field.value: Visible ASCII excluding CR and LF; typical: 'Service Unavailable'

field.name: Date-Header
field.value: HTTP-date in IMF-fixdate (RFC1123), e.g. 'Tue, 15 Nov 1994 08:12:31 GMT'

field.name: Retry-After-Header
field.value: either HTTP-date (IMF-fixdate) or delay-seconds = 1*DIGIT (decimal seconds), e.g. 'Fri, 31 Dec 1999 23:59:59 GMT' or '120'

field.name: Other-Headers
field.value: zero or more header-field lines: 'Field-Name: Field-Value' (visible ASCII; header syntax per HTTP)

field.name: Entity-Body
field.value: opaque octets (binary/ASCII); length determined by headers such as Content-Length or Transfer-Encoding

field.name: HeaderSection
field.value: zero or more header-field lines; each: field-name ':' OWS field-value OWS CRLF; characters VCHAR / obs-text excluding CR and LF

field.name: Header-Upgrade-Value
field.value: list of protocol entries: protocol-name [ '/' protocol-version ] *( OWS ',' OWS protocol ); protocol-name/token characters per HTTP token

field.name: Header-Connection-Value
field.value: comma-separated connection-options (tokens); MUST include token 'Upgrade' when Upgrade header is present

field.name: Header-Content-Length-Value
field.value: 1*DIGIT (decimal digits) representing octet count of message body

field.name: Header-Content-Type-Value
field.value: media-type (e.g., 'text/plain' with optional parameters); token characters per media-type grammar

field.name: Additional-Headers
field.value: zero or more header-lines (field-name ':' OWS field-value CRLF)

field.name: Message-Body
field.value: OCTETs; length in bytes MUST equal the numeric value of Content-Length header; content interpreted per Content-Type

field.name: Accept
field.value: media-range list with optional qvalues; US-ASCII

field.name: Content-Type
field.value: media-type per RFC 6838; US-ASCII or encoded per charset parameter

field.name: MessageBody
field.value: opaque octets; interpretation per Content-Type and Content-Encoding

field.name: ProtocolVersion
field.value: ASCII token matching 'HTTP/<major>.<minor>' (e.g., HTTP/1.1); characters: ALPHA DIGIT '/' '.'

field.name: ReasonPhrase
field.value: Optional human-readable text; VCHAR / obs-text excluding CR LF

field.name: HeaderSection
field.value: Zero or more header field lines: (field-name ':' OWS field-value OWS CRLF)

field.name: MessageBody
field.value: Octet sequence governed by headers (Content-Length, Transfer-Encoding, etc.); octets 0x00-0xFF

field.name: HeaderSection
field.value: zero or more header-field lines: field-name ':' OWS field-value OWS CRLF

field.name: Server
field.value: product *( RWS ( product / comment ) ) ; token and optional product-version

field.name: Other-Headers
field.value: other header-field lines permitted by HTTP grammar

field.name: EntityBody
field.value: OCTET sequence; typically a human-readable explanation (e.g., text/html or text/plain)

field.name: HTTP-Version
field.value: HTTP/1.0 | HTTP/1.1 | HTTP/2 | HTTP/3; token format 'HTTP/major.minor' in ASCII

field.name: HeaderFields
field.value: sequence of header-field lines: field-name ':' OWS field-value OWS CRLF; field-name token, field-value per RFC (ISO-8859-1 / obs-text)

field.name: Header-Server
field.value: product *( RWS ( product / comment ) ) ; token and optional version/comment

field.name: Header-ETag
field.value: entity-tag ; quoted-string with optional weak prefix 'W/'

field.name: Header-Connection
field.value: token *( OWS ',' OWS token ) ; e.g., close or keep-alive

field.name: Entity-Body
field.value: opaque octet stream; typical content is human-readable explanation (text/html or text/plain). If Content-Length present, size equals that value; otherwise delimited per Transfer-Encoding or connection close

field.name: Other-Headers
field.value: ASCII header fields (each terminated by CRLF)

field.name: Message-Body
field.value: opaque octets; governed by Content-Length or Transfer-Encoding; may be empty

field.name: Reason-Phrase
field.value: US-ASCII excluding CR LF; e.g., 'Request Timeout'

field.name: Message-Body
field.value: OCTET* or as indicated by Content-Length / Transfer-Encoding

field.name: Reason-Phrase
field.value: ASCII visible chars excluding CR, LF (typical: 'Permanent Redirect')

field.name: Other-Headers
field.value: zero or more header-field lines; each: field-name ':' SP field-value CRLF; field-name = token (tchar), field-value = field-content (OBS-safe)

field.name: Message-Body
field.value: opaque octets or textual representation (commonly short HTML with hyperlink(s)); encoding and length as indicated by headers (Content-Type, Content-Length, Transfer-Encoding)

field.name: Header-Fields
field.value: ASCII header-field lines (sequence of 'Name: SP Value' terminated by CRLF); characters 0x20-0x7E, HT allowed; exclude bare CR/LF except as terminators

field.name: Entity-Body
field.value: OCTETs; typical content is human-readable diagnostic (e.g., text/html or text/plain) encoded per Content-Type header; if absent, length 0

field.name: Other-Headers
field.value: Zero or more header fields; each 'field-name: field-value' terminated by CRLF; examples: Date, Server, Expires, Cache-Control, Content-Length, Content-Type

field.name: Entity-Body
field.value: If present: short HTML hypertext note (text/html) with hyperlink(s) to the new URI(s); absent for HEAD requests

field.name: HeaderFields
field.value: field-name ':' OWS field-value OWS CRLF ; ISO-8859-1 / obs-text allowed

field.name: EntityBody
field.value: octets (0x00-0xFF); length governed by Content-Length or Transfer-Encoding

field.name: Content-Range-Value
field.value: range-unit SP ( range-resp / unsatisfied-range ) where: range-unit = 'bytes' (most common) range-resp = first-pos '-' last-pos '/' ( complete-length | '*' ) first-pos, last-pos, complete-length = 1*DIGIT unsatisfied-range = '*' '/' complete-length Example for 416 (recommended): 'bytes */1234' (unsatisfied-range)

field.name: Content-Length-Value
field.value: 1*DIGIT (decimal number of octets in the message-body; optional for 416)

field.name: Content-Type-Value
field.value: media-type (e.g., 'text/plain; charset=UTF-8'); MUST NOT be 'multipart/byteranges' for 416 responses

field.name: Entity-Body
field.value: opaque octets (optional explanatory entity; length must match Content-Length if present)

field.name: Header:Location-URI
field.value: URI-reference (absolute or relative), ASCII excluding CR, LF

field.name: Header:Cache-Control-Value
field.value: token list (e.g., 'no-store', 'no-cache', 'max-age=...'), ASCII excluding CR, LF

field.name: Header:Expires-Value
field.value: HTTP-date (e.g., RFC1123 date), ASCII excluding CR, LF

field.name: Header:Content-Type-Value
field.value: media-type (e.g., 'text/html; charset=UTF-8'), ASCII excluding CR, LF

field.name: Header:Other-Headers
field.value: zero or more header fields: (field-name ':' OWS field-value OWS CRLF), ASCII excluding lone CR/LF in values

field.name: Entity-Body
field.value: opaque octets; typically short HTML with a hyperlink to Location URI; if present, length governed by Content-Length or transfer encoding

field.name: HeaderFields
field.value: zero or more header-field lines (ASCII): 'Field-Name: OWS Field-Value OWS'

field.name: MessageBody
field.value: opaque octets; length determined by headers (e.g., Content-Length, Transfer-Encoding)

field.name: Message-Body
field.value: OCTET* (as indicated by Transfer-Encoding or Content-Length)

field.name: ETag
field.value: entity-tag: either quoted-string or weak W/quoted-string (ASCII)

field.name: Warning
field.value: Warning: warn-code SP warn-agent SP quoted-text (ASCII)

field.name: Other-Headers
field.value: zero-or-more header-field lines (field-name ':' OWS field-value OWS) (ASCII excluding CR, LF)

field.name: LocationHeader
field.value: ASCII URI-reference (absolute-URI or relative) excluding CRLF

field.name: OtherHeaderFields
field.value: Sequence of header-field lines: field-name ':' SP field-value (ASCII) each terminated by CRLF

field.name: EntityBody
field.value: opaque octets (typically short HTML note with hyperlink); encoding per headers; absent for HEAD requests

field.name: Header_Section
field.value: *( field-name ':' OWS field-value CRLF ); field-name = token; field-value = field-content

field.name: Message_Body
field.value: OCTET stream; length determined by Transfer-Encoding (e.g., chunked) or Content-Length header or connection-close semantics

field.name: ReasonPhrase
field.value: HTAB / SP / VCHAR / obs-text (sequence of visible chars, HTAB, or obs-text until CRLF)

field.name: HeaderFields
field.value: *( field-name ':' OWS field-value CRLF ) ; ASCII token and field-value syntax per HTTP

field.name: MessageBody
field.value: OCTET* ; content bytes as indicated by Content-Length or Transfer-Encoding

field.name: Entity-Body
field.value: short HTML hypertext note containing a hyperlink to the Location URI; charset and length as indicated by headers

field.name: UpgradeProtocolList
field.value: comma-separated tokens: protocol-name [ '/' protocol-version ] where token chars = RFC tchar (ALPHA / DIGIT / '!' / '#' / '$' / '%' / & / ''' / '*' / '+' / '-' / '.' / '^' / '_' / '`' / '|' / '~')

field.name: ProtocolSwitchPayload
field.value: protocol-specific bytes (e.g., for h2c: HTTP/2 connection preface frames beginning with a SETTINGS frame)

field.name: OptionalEntityBody
field.value: opaque octets indicated by Content-Length or Transfer-Encoding; octet stream (binary/US-ASCII)

field.name: Other-Headers
field.value: zero or more header lines: field-name ':' OWS field-value OWS

field.name: MessageBody
field.value: opaque octets (length = Content-Length if present); recommended charset UTF-8 or ISO-8859-1

field.name: ReasonPhrase
field.value: US-ASCII excluding CR, LF; recommended value: 'Not Implemented'

field.name: HeaderFields
field.value: US-ASCII header-field lines: 'field-name: field-value' each terminated by CRLF; may be empty

field.name: MessageBody
field.value: opaque octets; length determined by Content-Length, Transfer-Encoding (e.g., chunked), or connection close; may be empty for 501 responses

field.name: HeaderFields
field.value: Sequence of header-field lines: US-ASCII 'field-name: OWS field-value OWS' each terminated by CRLF

field.name: MessageBody
field.value: Octet sequence (binary); length determined by Content-Length, Transfer-Encoding, or connection close

field.name: Content-Location-Value
field.value: URI-reference (identifies the original location of the enclosed entity)

field.name: EntityBody
field.value: opaque octet sequence; length determined by Content-Length; format determined by Content-Type

field.name: HeaderFields
field.value: *( field-name ':' OWS field-value OWS CRLF ); field-name=token; field-value=VCHAR / obs-text

field.name: MessageBody
field.value: octet-stream; length determined by Content-Length header or Transfer-Encoding (chunked) or connection close

field.name: AllowHeader_Value
field.value: Comma-separated list of method tokens (e.g., GET, HEAD, PUT). Each method is a token per RFC: standard methods (OPTIONS, GET, HEAD, POST, PUT, DELETE, TRACE, CONNECT) or extension-method (token characters: ALPHA / DIGIT / hyphen / other token chars). An empty value is allowed and indicates no methods are allowed.

field.name: OtherHeaders
field.value: Zero or more additional header lines formatted as field-name: field-value CRLF; each field-value is ASCII excluding CRLF.

field.name: EntityBody
field.value: Opaque octets; presence and length determined by Transfer-Encoding or Content-Length headers. If absent, this field is empty.

field.name: Reason-Phrase
field.value: Printable ASCII/obs-text excluding CR and LF (typical: 'Gone')

field.name: HeaderSection
field.value: 0 or more header fields; each: field-name ':' OWS field-value OWS CRLF; field-name token (tchar characters); field-value: field-content (VCHAR / obs-text)

field.name: MessageBody
field.value: opaque octets (0x00-0xFF); length determined by Content-Length header or Transfer-Encoding (e.g., chunked) or connection closure

field.name: Header-Fields
field.value: zero or more header lines: field-name ':' OWS field-value OWS ; US-ASCII / obs-text as allowed by RFCs

field.name: Other-Common-Headers
field.value: examples: Date, Server, ETag, Cache-Control, Vary, Location (header-value syntax per RFC)

field.name: HeaderFields
field.value: *( field-name ':' OWS field-value OWS CRLF ); ASCII header lines

field.name: Message-Body
field.value: opaque octet sequence; governed by Content-Length or Transfer-Encoding; bytes

field.name: HeaderFields
field.value: ASCII header-field sequences; each 'field-name: SP field-value' terminated by CRLF; zero or more occurrences allowed

field.name: Header-Section
field.value: zero or more header-field lines: field-name ':' OWS field-value OWS CRLF; field-name = token (tchar); field-value = field-content (VCHAR / obs-text)

field.name: Message-Body
field.value: opaque octet sequence; length determined by Transfer-Encoding or Content-Length; encoding/content-type per headers

field.name: MessageBody_MultipartByteranges
field.value: multipart body composed of boundary-delimited parts; each part: CRLF--boundary CRLF Part-Headers CRLF Part-Body ... --boundary--

field.name: Combining_Cache_Behavior
field.value: Policy notes: ETag/Last-Modified exact-match required to combine ranges

field.name: Header-Fields
field.value: sequence of header-field lines; each: field-name ':' SP field-value CRLF ; ASCII

field.name: Entity-Body
field.value: OCTETs; length indicated by Content-Length response header if present; otherwise connection-close delimits

field.name: StatusLine
field.value: HTTP-version SP Status-Code SP Reason-Phrase CRLF

field.name: Via
field.value: received-protocol RWS received-by [ RWS comment ] *( ',' received-protocol RWS received-by [ RWS comment ] )

field.name: MessageBody
field.value: OCTETS; length determined by Content-Length or Transfer-Encoding; media as indicated by Content-Type

field.name: Location-Header-Value
field.value: URI-reference (per RFC 3986); e.g., absolute- or relative-URI

field.name: Content-Type-Header-Value
field.value: media-type (e.g., text/html, application/json); may include parameters (charset, etc.)

field.name: Link-Header-Value
field.value: Link-value per RFC 8288; may include one or more comma-separated link-values with rel='alternate'

field.name: Other-Headers
field.value: Zero or more additional header fields (e.g., Cache-Control, Expires, ETag) as allowed by HTTP

field.name: Entity-Body
field.value: Opaque octet sequence whose semantics are given by Content-Type; for 300 typically contains a list of representation metadata and URI references in the indicated media type (e.g., HTML, JSON)

field.name: Reason-Phrase
field.value: ASCII characters excluding CR and LF

field.name: WWW-Authenticate-Challenge
field.value: auth-scheme [ 1*SP ( token68 / #auth-param ) ] ; ASCII-visible characters per challenge syntax

field.name: Entity-Body
field.value: opaque octets; representation (e.g., diagnostic HTML); length governed by headers such as Content-Length or Transfer-Encoding
